name: Bobotie (Lamb Meatloaf)
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak bread in milk until soft, then squeeze dry.
2. Sauté onions and apple in butter until tender.
3. Add bread, ground lamb, curry powder, sugar, vinegar, salt, pepper, and raisins to the skillet. Mix well.
4. Stir in one beaten egg and coarsely chopped almonds.
5. Pack mixture into a 9x5-inch baking dish. Arrange kaffir lime leaves on top.
6. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour.
7. Beat remaining egg with milk and turmeric. Pour over the meatloaf and bake for an additional 15 minutes.
8. Serve with rice and chutney.
